diagnosis: The player spawns at (208, 752) inside a solid-walled enclosure formed by row 22 (y=704-735) and row 23 (y=736-767) with no orthogonal empty tiles adjacent to the spawn point. The trace shows zero horizontal movement over 1.6 seconds, confirming the player is hard-locked from the first frame. This is a direct recurrence of the spawn-validation failure seen in round 5.
